signals.headline: House Rejects Iran War Powers Resolution 213-214, Preserving Trump's Authority** | YES | HIGH[1][3]
signals.raw:
House Rejects Iran War Powers Resolution 213-214, Preserving Trump's Authority** | YES | HIGH[1][3]

House Republicans, with one defection from Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) and one Democrat crossing over, narrowly defeated a war powers measure to limit Trump's Iran war powers on April 17, 2026, following a similar Senate rejection[1][3]. Trump claims a deal with Iran is "very close," amid Pentagon tr

signals.headline: 6 House Republicans Join Discharge Petition Against Trump on Haitian Deportations** | YES | MED[2]
signals.raw:
6 House Republicans Join Discharge Petition Against Trump on Haitian Deportations** | YES | MED[2]

Six Republicans, including MAGA supporters, crossed party lines with 212 Democrats to sign a discharge petition bypassing Speaker Johnson, forcing a vote to protect 350,000 Haitians from deportation amid Trump's policy[2].
matched_markets: Will the Republican Party win the NV-02 House seat?

signals.headline: Progressive Democrat Wins NJ Special Election, Shrinking GOP House Majority to 1-Vote Margin** | YES | HIGH[3]
signals.raw:
Progressive Democrat Wins NJ Special Election, Shrinking GOP House Majority to 1-Vote Margin** | YES | HIGH[3]

Analilia Mejía's victory in New Jersey's special House election narrows Republicans' majority, leaving Speaker Johnson unable to lose more than one GOP vote on party-line bills[3].
